# sequence_number (Resource)

Generates a zero-padded sequential number. The number increments by 1 each time the `keepers` map changes.

## Example Usage

```terraform
variable "region" {
  type    = string
  default = "eu-west-1"
}

resource "sequence_number" "vm" {
  start  = 1
  width  = 3
  prefix = "vm-"

  keepers = {
    region = var.region
  }
}

output "vm_name" {
  value = sequence_number.vm.formatted
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `keepers` (Map of String) Arbitrary map of string values. Changing any value increments `number` by 1.
- `prefix` (String) String prepended to the padded number. Defaults to empty.
- `start` (Number) First value emitted on resource creation. Defaults to 1.
- `suffix` (String) String appended to the padded number. Defaults to empty.
- `width` (Number) Zero-padding width for the formatted output. `width = 3` → `"001"`. Defaults to 3.

### Read-Only

- `formatted` (String) `prefix + zero-pad(number, width) + suffix`.
- `id` (String) Same as `formatted`.
- `number` (Number) The current sequence number.
